scenario_goal: Ask GRC Agent to disconnect the secondary QT time sink wire from blocks_char_to_float_0 output 0 to qtgui_time_sink_x_1 input 0 on the copied graph.
allowed_user_behavior: Ask naturally to disconnect the wire from blocks_char_to_float_0 output 0 to qtgui_time_sink_x_1 input 0.
Mention that this should happen on the copied graph.
forbidden_user_behavior: Do not mention internal tool names, JSON, schemas, or judge expectations.
Do not ask to edit raw YAML.
Do not ask to save or load.
